note: Internal sanity check only. This is NOT verification (invariant I4) -- a separate /cdr:verify agent independently verifies.

checks.check: go test ./rpc/... -race -timeout 120s -v (full package, includes 3.2.2/3.2.4/3.2.5 tests together)
checks.result: PASS, no data races, no regressions to existing TestRPCServerHandlers/TestLatencyInterceptor/TestEdgeTypeConversionRoundTrip
PASS across all packages: engine, btree, catalog, graph, mvcc, rpc, split, wal

validation_matrix_coverage: AC1-AC6 all covered by TestRPCIntegration's subtests, see validation-matrix.json
deviations_from_plan: PutSegment_Append subtest originally planned to assert NewVersion==2 after append; corrected during implementation after observing ContentStore.Append does not bump CurrentVersion (append is a same-version content mutation), consistent with engine/rpc/server_test.go's existing PutSegment_Append subtest, which likewise makes no NewVersion assertion after append. No production code was changed to accommodate this -- test expectation was adjusted to match already-verified (task-3.2.2) production behavior.
